title: PerfoMAX
description: Minecraft ModPack that aims to increase perfomance, while adding useful modifications, like zooming, and shaders for fabric.
body:
PerfoMAX **aims to increase performance**, but at the same time **tries to keep the beauties of Minecraft.**

In addition, **it adds many useful functions such as zooming, shaders, overriding server's render-distance limit, dynamic lights, and support for using animated resource packs,** like Fresh Moves.

There's **no support server yet,** it will probably be in the next update. **I'll try to update PerfoMAX as soon as a new Minecraft version comes out.**

Compatibility: PerfoMAX supports if you want to add more mods, that modify the gameplay. Please use Java 21.

Q&A

Q: Why would I want to download **PerfoMAX?**
A: Because **it offers lots of optimizations, lots of features and it's user-friendly.**

Q: Will it run **on my PC?**
A: Yes! **It runs on most PCs.** **PerfoMAX is a lightweight ModPack,** **made for Low-End PCs** to increase performance.

Q: What if it **doesn't run?**
A: **No problem!** I will try to **make the modpack as compatible as possible,** so that it can **run even on the weakest PCs!**
